steps.code: <?php $_SERVER['HTTP_HOST']='127.0.0.1'; require_once '/wordpress/wp-load.php'; require_once ABSPATH.'wp-admin/includes/upgrade.php'; install_network(); $r=populate_network(1,'127.0.0.1',get_option('admin_email'),get_option('blogname'),'/',false); echo is_wp_error($r)?'Error: '.$r->get_error_message():'Multisite network created';
